stages.concept:
# Unit 125: 소유격 관계대명사 whose - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **소유격 관계대명사 whose**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I know the boy **whose** father is a doctor.
> 나는 아버지가 의사인 소년을 안다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whose**는 관계절에서 **소유격** 역할을 해요. **~의**라는 뜻이에요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **사람** 선행사:

> The girl **whose** hair is long is my friend.
> 머리카락이 긴 소녀는 내 친구이다.

> I met a woman **whose** son is a singer.
> 나는 아들이 가수인 여자를 만났다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **사물** 선행사에도 쓸 수 있어요.

> I live in a house **whose** roof is red.
> 나는 지붕이 빨간 집에 산다.

> This is the book **whose** cover is torn.
> 이것은 표지가 찢어진 책이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: whose 뒤에는 반드시 **명사**가 와요!

> whose + 명사 (whose father, whose hair, whose roof 등)

**Q. 다음 문장의 (       )에 들어갈 알맞은 관계대명사를 고르세요.**
"The man (       ) car was stolen reported it to the police."
1. who
2. whom
3. whose ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 선행사(The man)와 뒤에 오는 명사(car)의 관계가 '그 남자의 자동차'라는 소유 관계이므로, 소유격 관계대명사인 whose를 써야 한답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리!

| 관계대명사 | 역할 | 사람 | 사물 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 주격 | 주어 | who (that) | which (that) |
| 목적격 | 목적어 | who(m) (that) | which (that) |
| 소유격 | ~의 | whose | whose |

🧑‍🎓 학생: whose는 소유격으로 사람/사물 모두 가능! 뒤에 항상 명사가 오는 거군요. 주격/목적격/소유격 표가 정리가 잘 되네요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 125: 소유격 관계대명사 whose - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I bought a bag (     ) color is black.
> **정답** whose

---

**02.** The boy ? mother is a doctor is smart.
> **정답** whose

---

**03.** She has a friend ? father is a pilot.
> **정답** whose

---

**04.** I live in a house ? roof is red.
> **정답** whose

---

**05.** The man ? car is parked here is my neighbor.
> **정답** whose

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The boy who mother is a teacher is kind.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → whose

---

**07.** I have a cat which eyes are blue.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → whose

---

**08.** The girl who name is Amy is my friend.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → whose

---

**09.** I met a man which son is a singer.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → whose

---

**10.** The house who roof is blue is mine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → whose

---

**11.** 두 문장을 관계대명사 whose를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I know a boy. His father is a pilot.
> **정답** I know a boy whose father is a pilot.

---

**12.** She has a dog. Its fur is brown.
> **정답** She has a dog whose fur is brown.

---

**13.** The girl is kind. Her smile is pretty.
> **정답** The girl whose smile is pretty is kind.

---

**14.** I live in a house. Its garden is big.
> **정답** I live in a house whose garden is big.

---

**15.** The man is my uncle. His car is red.
> **정답** The man whose car is red is my uncle.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
아버지가 의사인 소년은 똑똑하다.
The boy whose is father a doctor is smart
> **정답** The / boy / whose / father / is / a / doctor / is / smart

---

**17.** 나는 눈이 파란 고양이를 키운다.
have I a cat whose are eyes blue
> **정답** I / have / a / cat / whose / eyes / are / blue

---

**18.** 이름이 Amy인 소녀는 내 친구이다.
The girl whose is name Amy is my friend
> **정답** The / girl / whose / name / is / Amy / is / my / friend

---

**19.** 지붕이 빨간 집은 우리 집이다.
The house whose is roof red is mine
> **정답** The / house / whose / roof / is / red / is / mine

---

**20.** 나는 아들이 가수인 남자를 만났다.
met I a man whose is son a singer
> **정답** I / met / a / man / whose / son / is / a / singer
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 125: 소유격 관계대명사 whose - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Yesterday, I met a boy _____________ name is Tom.
The student had a laptop _______________ cover
was grey.
which
who
whom
whose
> **정답** whose

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Mr. Brown drives a car _______________ has only
two doors.
His car _________________ roof can be opened looks
expensive.
which - whom
which - whose
whose - that
that - whom
> **정답** which - whose

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I know the girl ___________ brother is a movie star.
The lamp ___________ I bought in downtown is
beautiful.
who - whose
that - that
whom - whose
whose - which
> **정답** whose - which

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
The food whose we eat at the cafe was
delicious.
Tom once lived in a house whose roof had a
chimney.
He discussed business matters with Amy
whose he can trust.
I adore the baby whose hands are so tiny.
• adore 아주 좋아하다
• chimney 굴뚝
> **정답** He discussed business matters with Amy whose he
can trust., The food whose we eat at the cafe was
delicious.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Do you know the boy whom mother is a
nurse?
I go to the same school as Tom whose interest
is playing soccer.
The patient whom is unwell has to stay at the
hospital.
The backpack which I bought at the mall was
expensive
> **정답** The patient whom is unwell has to stay at the
hospital., Do you know the boy whom mother is a
nurse?

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이벤트의 진행자는 목소리가 좋았던 한 신사였다.
The host of the event was a gentleman whom
voice was nice.
The host of the event was a gentleman whose
voice was nice.
The host of the event was a gentleman who
voice was nice.
The host of the event was a gentleman which
voice was nice.
> **정답** The host of the event was a gentleman whose voice
was nice.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 창문이 모두 깨진 집을 보았다.
I saw a house whose windows was all broken.
I saw a house who windows were all broken.
I saw a house whose windows were all broken.
I saw a house which windows were all broken.
> **정답** I saw a house whose windows were all broken.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
사람들은 건반 위에서 손가락이 매우 빠르게 움직이는 그
피아니스트를 존경한다.
People respect the pianist whose fingers
moves very fast on the keys.
People respect the pianist whose fingers
move very fast on the keys.
People respect the pianist which fingers move
very fast on the keys.
People respect the pianist who fingers move
very fast on the keys.
> **정답** People respect the pianist whose fingers move very
fast on the keys.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The firefighters save people whose lives are in
danger.
My sister whose hobby is cooking is a
musician.
The baby whose eyes were very big started to
cry.
A man whose took the kid to an ice cream
shop bought strawberry ice cream.
• lives 생명
> **정답** A man whose took the kid to an ice cream shop
bought strawberry ice cream.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She helped a boy whose leg was broken.
I have a friend whom father is a famous writer.
The woman whose picture is in the magazine
is famous.
The girl whose bike was stolen was sad.
> **정답** I have a friend whom father is a famous writer.

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
He drinks a cup of coffee.
Its smell is so nice.
He drinks a cup of coffee whose smell is so
nice.
He drinks a cup of coffee who smell is so nice.
He drinks a cup of coffee whom smell is so
nice.
He drinks a cup of coffee which smell is so
nice.
> **정답** He drinks a cup of coffee whose smell is so nice.

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
The English teacher taught Tom.
Tom's writing skill was excellent.
The English teacher taught Tom which writing
skill was excellent.
The English teacher taught Tom whom writing
skill was excellent.
The English teacher taught Tom whose
writing skill was excellent.
The English teacher taught Tom who writing
skill was excellent.
> **정답** The English teacher taught Tom whose writing skill
was excellent.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
Amy often talks about Tom which I don't
remember well.
The people whom moved into town are
French.
Amy was wearing glasses whose cost a lot.
I was sitting on a chair whose legs were too
old.
> **정답** I was sitting on a chair whose legs were too old.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
They grabbed some snacks whose taste is too
salty.
The teacher adored a boy who goals was high.
Dr. Brown saw the girl whom carried a lot of
bags.
I sometimes spend time with Tom who
nickname is Zoro.
> **정답** They grabbed some snacks whose taste is too salty.

---

**15.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Look at that house ________ roof was painted
red.
The man _______ daughter is in my class is
friendly.
I have a friend _______ brother is an English
teacher.
The coat _______ I gave to Tom was too
small for me.
> **정답** The coat _______ I gave to Tom was too small for
me.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom complained to Mrs. Kim
whom dogs bit his leg.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** whom → whose

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The famous singer whose songs
is awesome will hold a
concert.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → are

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom whom health was bad
decided to exercise.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** whom → whose

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
I go to school with Tom whose interest is the
same as mine. We are in the same soccer team.
After school, we practice soccer together. Our
coach whom has a long beard makes us
practice soccer for two hours. Then, Tom's mom
which job is a lawyer comes to pick us up.
Tom's mom sometimes cooks dinner which
tastes amazing.
• interest 흥미, 관심
> **정답** whose, who, whose, which

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
At the party, Tom met the girl whom his friend
talked about. She wore a pretty red dress
which design was very unique. Tom
approached her and talked to her. They talked
about the recently released movie whose
ending was a bit sad. They promised to see the
movie together, and she left the party with her
another friend whom lives next door to her.
> **정답** whom, whose, whose, who
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 125 소유격 관계대명사 whose중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
Ann은 손이 떨리고 있던 한 소년을 진정시켰다. [hands,
be, shake]
Ann calmed a boy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• calm 진정시키다
정답 whose, hands, were, shaking

---

**02.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
엄마가 교사인 그 소년은 내 친구이다. [mother, be, a
teacher]
The boy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is my
friend.
정답 whose, mother, is, a, teacher

---

**03.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
이 책은 저자가 독일인인 책이다. [author, be, German]
This is the book  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 whose, author, is, German

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
[People]  [are]  [jealous]  [of]  [Mr.]
[Wilson]  [who]  [success]  [is]  [certain.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 who → whose

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
[Tom]  [which]  [eyesight]  [is]  [bad]
[doesn]  't  [like]  [watching]  [movies.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• eyesight 시력
정답 which → whose

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그는 차를 도난당한 사람이다.
힌트 (     ) was, car, whose, stolen
He is the man  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 whose, car, was, stolen

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
자존심이 매우 높은 Amy는 아무와도 이야기하지 않았다.
힌트 (     ) very, is, whose, pride, high
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  did not
talk to anyone.
정답 whose, pride, is, very, high

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
평판이 좋은 그 주방장은 이 레스토랑에서 일한다.
힌트 (     ) quite, whose, good, is, reputation
The chef  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
works in this restaurant.
• reputation 평판, 명성
정답 whose, reputation, is, quite, good

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
who/whose, math answer, wrong, be
A: Who is the teacher talking to?
B: She is talking to Tom  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 whose, math, answer, is, wrong

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
which/whose, food, tasty, be
A: Where did you have lunch today?
B: We had lunch at Italian restaurant  (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 whose, food, is (was), tasty

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 125: 소유격 관계대명사 whose - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Yesterday, I met a girl _____________ name is Amy.
The student had a phone _______________ screen was cracked. which who whom whose
> 정답: whose

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Mr. Kim drives a truck _______________ has four wheels.
His truck _________________ engine can be very loud looks powerful.
which - whom which - whose whose - that that - whom
> 정답: which - whose

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I know the boy ___________ sister is a singer.
The lamp ___________ I fixed in the hallway is bright.
who - whose that - that whom - whose whose - which
> 정답: whose - which

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The drink whose we had at the café was refreshing.
Tom once stayed in a room whose wall had a painting.
She discussed the project with Amy whose she can rely on.
I adore the puppy whose paws are so tiny.
> 정답: She discussed the project with Amy whose she

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Do you know the girl whom mother is a teacher?
I go to the same club as Tom whose hobby is reading books.
The student whom is absent has to call the teacher. teacher.
The jacket which I bought at the store was expensive.
> 정답: The student whom is absent has to call the teacher.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
대회의 심사위원장은 목소리가 큰 한 여성이었다.
The head judge of the contest was a woman whom voice was loud.
The head judge of the contest was a woman whose voice was loud.
The head judge of the contest was a woman who voice was loud.
The head judge of the contest was a woman which voice was loud.
> 정답: The head judge of the contest was a woman whose voice

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 문이 모두 잠긴 건물을 보았다.
I saw a building whose doors was all locked.
I saw a building who doors were all locked.
I saw a building whose doors were all locked.
I saw a building which doors were all locked.
> 정답: I saw a building whose doors were all locked.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
사람들은 무대 위에서 손이 매우 빠르게 움직이는 그 마술사를 존경한다.
People admire the magician whose hands moves very fast on the stage.
People admire the magician whose hands move very fast on the stage.
People admire the magician which hands move very fast on the stage.
People admire the magician who hands move very fast on the stage.
> 정답: People admire the magician whose hands move very

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The police protect people whose safety is in danger.
My brother whose interest is cooking is a student.
The baby whose cheeks were very round started to laugh.
A woman whose took the child to a bookstore bought many notebooks.
> 정답: A woman whose took the child to a bookstore

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She helped a girl whose arm was injured.
I have a friend whom mother is a famous artist.
The man whose photo is in the newspaper is famous.
The boy whose phone was lost was upset.
> 정답: I have a friend whom mother is a famous artist.
